message:
fix(snapshot): log best-effort DB failures, continue mux_pool runtime_compat migration

snapshot_engine.rs:
- Replace silent unwrap_or_default() with explicit match that logs a
  tracing::warn when best-effort DB operations fail, aiding diagnosis
  of transient storage issues in long-running sessions

mux_pool.rs:
- Continue runtime_compat migration: convert remaining #[tokio::test]
  tests to run_async_test() pattern with RuntimeBuilder::current_thread()
- Restructure test helper functions for consistency with other migrated
  test modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
